headline: 33 contracts catalogued across Ethereum, BNB Chain, and Solana; 12 core protocol and manager contracts plus 21 token/oracle/bridge addresses.
short_headline: 33 contracts across 3 chains; core GM, USDY, OUSG products

findings.text: Block explorer name-tag search and official documentation found Ondo Global Markets contracts on Ethereum (GMTokenManager, USDon, etc.), BNB Chain (GMTokenManager, USDon, oracle), and Solana (Program ID, USDon).

Official deployments doc at https://docs.ondo.finance/addresses comprehensively lists all active contracts per chain with roles and descriptions; includes sections for OUSG, USDY, Ondo Global Markets, Ondo Bridge, and legacy contracts.

Audit links page at https://docs.ondo.finance/audits identifies multiple audits for Ondo Global Markets (Spearbit, Cyfrin, FYEO, Cantina, Zellic between June 2025–Feb 2026) with PDF links; audits scope various contracts including GMTokenManager, USDon, SyntheticSharesOracle, and Solana program.

GitHub organization https://github.com/ondoprotocol confirmed; repositories include global-markets-solana, usdy, ondo-v1, and usdy-noble; audit links reference code4rena audit reports (2024-03-ondo-finance) detailing scope of OUSG, rOUSG, CashManager, and KYCRegistry contracts.

Multi-chain enumeration completed: Ethereum (GMTokenManager 0x2c158BC456e027b2AfFCCadF1BDBD9f5fC4c5C8c, USDon 0xAcE8E719899F6E91831B18AE746C9A965c2119F1, 6 total core addresses); BNB Chain (GMTokenManager 0x91f8Aff3738825e8eB16FC6f6b1A7A4647bDB299, USDon 0x1f8955E640Cbd9abc3C3Bb408c9E2E1f5F20DfE6, 5 total); Solana (Program ID XzTT4XB8m7sLD2xi6snefSasaswsKCxx5Tifjondogm, USDon ZPFtoCe7WWqG4N3ZFRccS8T9SMBeHsd1Vmgv2i7ondo, 3 total).

GM tokens factory pattern documented: official docs reference 'GM Tokens' with links to external Dropbox CSV (https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/qjfxyg748mx0dwi6up86d/EXTERNAL-Ondo-GM-Tokens-Ondo-GM-Tokens.csv) listing individual tokenized stock contracts per asset; capped at enumeration reference rather than full child enumeration.

Role taxonomy applied: GMTokenManager (manager), USDon (token), USDonManager (peg-stability-module), SyntheticSharesOracle (oracle), GMTokenLimitOrder (manager), OndoOracle (oracle), OndoIDRegistry (registry), Blocklist (registry), Bridge OFT Adapters (bridge), with actor classes set to unknown pending further analysis.

All 33 addresses traced to https://docs.ondo.finance/addresses official deployment documentation; audit references (https://docs.ondo.finance/audits) provide scope confirmation; GitHub repo (https://github.com/ondoprotocol) validates organizational ownership.

rationale.verdict: Discovered 33 total contract addresses from official sources (docs.ondo.finance/addresses, audit PDFs, GitHub), spanning 3 chains (Ethereum, BNB Chain, Solana) with documented roles and categorization. Protocol leverages manager/token/oracle/registry/bridge architecture with factory pattern for individual GM asset tokens.

evidence.shows: Official smart contract addresses page listing all deployed contracts across OUSG (Ethereum/Polygon/Solana/XRP Ledger), USDY (Ethereum/Mantle/Solana/Sui/Aptos/Noble/Arbitrum/Stellar/Plume/Sei), Ondo Global Markets (Ethereum/BNB Chain/Solana), Ondo Bridge, and legacy contracts with roles and descriptions.

Smart Contract Audits page listing 10 audits for Ondo Global Markets (Spearbit June 2025, Cyfrin July 2025, FYEO September 2025, Cantina October 2025, FYEO November 2025, Cantina November 2025, Cantina December 2025, Cantina December 2025, Zellic December 2025, Cantina February 2026) with PDF links; additional audits for USDY and deprecated products.
Ondo Finance GitHub organization with 15 public repositories including global-markets-solana, usdy, ondo-v1, usdy-noble supporting RWA tokenization and stablecoin infrastructure.

Trust & Transparency page for Ondo Global Markets describing bankruptcy-remote SPV structure (Ondo Global Markets (BVI) Limited), Ankura Trust Company as Verification Agent and Security Agent, daily attestations, and full asset backing.
Main protocol website confirming Ondo Finance offers tokenized real-world assets including USDY, OUSG, and Ondo Global Markets.

unknowns: D6: GM Tokens child enumeration deferred to downstream slice; individual asset token addresses stored in external Dropbox CSV not directly accessible for content-addressed citation.
D8-offchain: No on-chain contract reads attempted this run; surfacers for discovered addresses will be generated for next assessment cycle enabling proxy/admin/owner verification.

protocol_metadata.about: Ondo Global Markets enables KYC'd investors to mint and redeem tokenized stocks backed by underlying equities and ETFs, leveraging a centralized manager contract (GMTokenManager) to facilitate USDC/USDon swaps for GM token issuance. The protocol operates on Ethereum, BNB Chain, and Solana with a peg-stability module (USDonManager), synthetic shares oracle (SyntheticSharesOracle), and limit order functionality; assets are held by a bankruptcy-remote SPV with third-party custodial and security oversight.
